name: Fiddlehead Quiche
recipeIngredient: 18 Fiddlehead crosiers, cooked (do not use stems)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the milk, cream, and eggs. Beat with a rotary egg beater.
2. Add the salt, pepper, and onions to the mixture.
3. Sprinkle half of the grated cheese into the bottom of the pastry shell.
4. Arrange the fiddlehead tips over the cheese, then add the bacon, breaking it into bite-sized pieces.
5. Pour in the milk mixture, adding the remaining cheese and grate fresh nutmeg on top.
6. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes, or until a knife inserted into the custard comes out clean.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings.
Recipe sourced from The Wild Flavor by Marilyn Kluger (ISBN 0-87477-338-5).
